description: Springer Nature is a scientific and academic publisher that provides access to research publications and related metadata. Its developer offering focuses on APIs for metadata retrieval, open-access content, and text/data-mining access to scholarly documents.
summary: springernature.com exposes one authenticated HTTP API surface on api.springernature.com covering Open Access, Meta, Metadata, and Full Text/TDM endpoints; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surface was found.
